<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Translation\Formatter; /** * @author Guilherme Blanco <guilhermeblanco@hotmail.com> * @author Abdellatif Ait boudad <a.aitboudad@gmail.com> */ interface MessageFormatterInterface { /** * Formats a localized message pattern with given arguments. * * @param string $message The message (may also be an object that can be cast to string) * @param string $locale The message locale * @param array $parameters An array of parameters for the message */ public function format(string $message, string $locale, array $parameters = []): string; }
